name: Banana Cake to Take
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 9 x 13 pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine all cake ingredients on low speed until moistened.
3. Beat mixture on high speed for 2 minutes.
4. Pour batter into prepared pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Meanwhile, melt margarine in a small saucepan. Stir in remaining topping ingredients.
7. Spread topping over hot cake and broil 2 to 3 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Cool completely.
